hero.title: go-i2p
hero.subtitle: Pūnaha I2P mō Go — pouarotaki, whare pukapuka SAM, ngā awa, waitohu me ngā taputapu.
callout.desc: Kāore anō kia whai hua te pouarotaki go-i2p. Mō te whakaputa, whakamahia i2pd (C++) rānei Java I2P.
callout.libs: He pumau ngā whare pukapuka hono (onramp, goSam, sam3), ā, ka mahi ki te pouarotaki I2P.
desc.goSam: Proxy HTTP i ~50 rārangi. Māmā, taea te whirihora.
desc.sam3: SAMv3.3 katoa. Kwhiringa katoa, taipitopito katoa.
desc.go-i2p: Pouarotaki I2P Go mā. 97★. Kāore anō kia whai hua.
desc.common: Whare pukapuka motuhanga i te pouarotaki.
desc.i2pkeys: Whakahaere kī I2P. Ka whakamahia e onramp/goSam/sam3.
desc.su3: Whare pukapuka SU3 me te manatūtuhi.
desc.go-i2ptunnel: I2PTunnel mō Go. Neke atu i sam-forwarder.
desc.go-meta-dialer: Kaiwaea kotahi mō clearnet, onion me I2P.
desc.go-connfilter: Tātari hono ki te taumata net.Listener.
desc.go-forward: API mā mō te whakawhiti/whakawhiti whatunga.
desc.go-i2p-bt: BitTorrent mō I2P. Rite ki I2PSnark.
desc.railroad: Pūkaha blog me ngā āhua Ghost.
desc.i2p-stats: Pūkete me te kaihui pūrongo pouarotaki.
desc.gitlab-to-gitea: Nuku punaha mai i GitLab ki Gitea.
desc.util: Mahi āwhina kāore e hāngai ki wāhi kē.
maturity.onramp: mature, implements SAMv3.3, Streaming and Datagrams
maturity.go-sam-go: mature, implements SAMv3.3, Streaming and Datagrams
maturity.go-i2pcontrol: mature but does not provide all possible consts (like ratestats)
section.interface_note: Connection libraries act as drop-in replacements for net.Conn and net.PacketConn in your Go code. When used correctly, they make it easy to adapt Go applications to I2P.
section.quickstart.note: Requires a running I2P router (i2pd or Java I2P). See onramp for full docs.
status.ready.title: ✅ Production Ready
status.ready.desc: Connection libraries (onramp, goSam, sam3) are stable and work with any I2P router. The Streaming and Datagram APIs are reliable.
status.dev.title: 🔧 In Development
status.dev.desc: The core router (go-i2p) is operational but not production-safe. I2CP, Streaming, and Datagram client libraries are functional but APIs may change between 0.1.x and 0.2.0.
status.advice.title: 📋 For Developers
status.advice.desc: The API below onramp is unstable. Use high-level libraries to minimize churn. See the router README for detailed status.
